data.title: Endúr ASA Advances Share Buyback Strategy
data.description:
Endur ASA (DE:4ZT0) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Endúr ASA has actively continued its share buyback program, purchasing 8,911 shares in the latest week at an average price of NOK 64.34 per share. This brings the total shares acquired under the program to 407,987, with a weighted average price of NOK 50.99, amounting to NOK 20.8 million. The buyback program is set to continue until February 2026, reflecting the company’s confidence in its market position.

For further insights into DE:4ZT0 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Scancell Holdings Secures £11.3 Million in Oversubscribed Offering
data.description:
Scancell Holdings (GB:SCLP) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Scancell Holdings has successfully raised approximately £11.3 million through a significantly oversubscribed retail offer and capital raise, priced at 10.5 pence per share. This financial boost, involving the issuance of 9,523,809 new ordinary shares, attracted considerable interest from both existing and new healthcare specialist investors. The new shares are set to be traded on AIM, increasing the company’s total voting rights to over 1 billion shares.

data.title: Yuzhou Group Plans Debt Restructuring and Equity Changes
data.description:
Yuzhou Group Holdings Co., Ltd. (HK:1628) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Yuzhou Group Holdings Co., Ltd. has announced plans to restructure its offshore debts and proposed a Rights Issue, new equity issuance, and a change in board lot size. The company will hold an Extraordinary General Meeting on December 30, 2024, to discuss these plans, with a book closure period set from December 23 to December 30, 2024. Shareholders are reminded to register their shares by December 20, 2024, to qualify for participation.

For further insights into HK:1628 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Planetree International Announces Share Registrar Changes
data.description:
Planetree International Development Limited (HK:0613) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Planetree International Development Limited has announced a change in its principal share registrar and transfer office in Bermuda to Conyers Corporate Services, effective December 31, 2024. Meanwhile, its Hong Kong branch will transition to Tricor Investor Services from January 1, 2025. These changes mark a significant shift in the company’s administrative operations.

data.title: Shinhan Financial Group Updates Dividend Record Dates
data.description:
Shinhan Financial Group Co (SHG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Shinhan Financial Group has revised its Articles of Incorporation to set a more flexible record date for determining shareholders eligible for year-end dividends, aligning with global standards. The new record date for the fiscal year 2024 dividends will be after mid-February 2025, ensuring that shareholders are determined after the final dividend amount is decided. This change aims to streamline the dividend distribution process and enhance shareholder satisfaction.

For further insights into SHG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Green Esteel’s Strategic Stake in HG Metal Rises
data.description:
HG Metal Manufacturing Limited (SG:BTG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Green Esteel Pte. Ltd. has committed to subscribing to a significant number of shares in HG Metal Manufacturing Limited through a rights issue, potentially increasing its stake in the company to over 30%. This move could trigger an obligation for Green Esteel to make a mandatory general offer for the remaining shares, in accordance with Singapore’s takeover regulations. The dealings, involving over 74 million shares, highlight Green Esteel’s strategic investment position in HG Metal.

For further insights into SG:BTG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mitchells & Butlers Directors Engage in Share Transactions
data.description:
Mitchells & Butlers (GB:MAB) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Mitchells & Butlers directors Phil Urban and Tim Jones, along with PDMR Andrew Freeman, have engaged in share transactions as part of the company’s Short Term Deferred Incentive Plan. On December 6, 2024, shares vested for these individuals, with some sold to cover taxes and National Insurance, while the rest were retained in line with the company’s remuneration policy. These transactions reflect the company’s commitment to its shareholding policies and transparency in managerial share dealings.

For further insights into GB:MAB stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
